overall.description: First-person game footage depicting a nighttime walk across a wooden footbridge in a forested area, transitioning to a dirt path while holding a wooden staff, approaching a distant lit cabin.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge in darkness, viewing the path ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway with visible gaps
rough wooden guardrail with horizontal posts on the left side
rough wooden guardrail with horizontal posts on the right side
dark silhouetted trees against the night sky forming the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking across a narrow wooden bridge at night. The bridge has rough wooden railings on both sides and planks underfoot, with dark forest visible ahead against the night sky.

events.description: steps off the wooden bridge onto uneven dirt and grass terrain
player character's left hand holding a wooden staff enters the frame from the left

agents.ego_description: walking through grassy terrain toward a distant lit cabin, holding a wooden pole in the left hand

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail with scattered stones and patches of grass
tall wild grass lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass lining the right side of the path
small wooden structure with warm yellow light glowing from windows

segments.scene_description: Having left the bridge, the camera moves along a dirt path through tall grass. The player's hand holding a wooden staff becomes visible on the left. In the distance, a wooden cabin with lit windows provides the only light source in the dark forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow wooden bridge into a dark forest toward a distant light. It begins with a steady walk across rough wooden planks and railings, with the dense, dark woods looming ahead against the night sky. As the camera leaves the bridge, the terrain shifts to a dirt path cutting through tall grass, and a hand gripping a wooden staff enters the frame on the left. The scene then opens up to reveal a solitary wooden cabin in the distance, its lit windows serving as the sole beacon of light within the surrounding darkness.
